generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Integrated into BIM model to capture real-time operational data for continuous synchronization between physical building and virtual representation. Monitors environmental conditions and operational states."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors environmental parameters (temperature, humidity, air quality) within building infrastructure for real-time DT synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalConditionDataTransmitted
]

instance OperationalStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks building system operational states (HVAC, lighting, occupancy) for adaptive control and performance evaluation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OperationalStateDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance PostOccupancySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time data stream from post-occupancy sensors via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for DT pipeline integration."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Environmental parameter data transmitted via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for continuous synchronization with virtual representation."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalConditionSensor
]

instance OperationalStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Building system operational state data exchanged in real-time through Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OperationalStateSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based semantic model containing geometry, topology, and component relationships serving as DT's semantic backbone."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance RuntimeDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured runtime data including sensor readings, control logic, and middleware metadata for Eclipse Hono/Ditto integration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData PostOccupancySensorDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalConditionDataTransmitted, OperationalStateDataTransmitted
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets for interactive 3D representation of building operations and environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineEnabler
]

instance ControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning policies (BOREALIS) and rule-based logic (TwinLight) for adaptive building control systems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TwinLightEnabler, BorealisEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time bidirectional communication between physical sensors and DT pipeline."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for device management and state synchronization in the DT constellation."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for immersive visualization of building operations and environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance TwinLightEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TwinLight framework for energy-efficient lighting control and adaptive building management."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

instance BorealisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS platform for reinforcement learning-based optimization of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, AdaptiveControlService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools for automated generation of DT artifacts from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentAutomationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building operations and environmental conditions with real-time data visualization."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOperationInsight, EnvironmentalConditionInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization and adaptive control through predictive analytics using sensor data trends."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, AdaptiveControlInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of building operations and environmental conditions via Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizedBuildingOperationInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of building systems (lighting, HVAC) based on real-time data and predictive models."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficientLightingAction, ReinforcementLearningOptimizationAction
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of sensor data trends to predict equipment failures and maintenance needs."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceRecommendationInsight
]

instance DeploymentAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated deployment pipeline for DT components using model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentConfigurationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingOperationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status of building systems including occupancy patterns and equipment performance."
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current and historical environmental parameters (temperature, humidity, air quality) for building optimization."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive energy consumption analysis and optimization recommendations based on operational data."
]

instance AdaptiveControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for adaptive control policies to improve building efficiency and occupant comfort."
]

instance VisualizedBuildingOperationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations with real-time data overlays for facility managers."
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts based on sensor data trends and equipment degradation patterns."
]

instance DeploymentConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated generation of DT deployment configurations from BIM models using MDE principles."
]

instance EnergyEfficientLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on occupancy and environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReinforcementLearningOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic optimization of building systems using reinforcement learning algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical actuators embedded in Building Control Systems for executing control commands from DT."
]

instance LightingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TwinLight integrated lighting control system for energy-efficient adaptive lighting management."
]

instance AdaptiveControlController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning controller for dynamic building system optimization."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through **bidirectional communication channels** established between the DT and the physical Building Control System (BCS). The DT generates control signals (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) based on real-time analytics, optimization algorithms (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS), or user inputs. These signals are transmitted back to the physical actuators via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware**, ensuring low-latency execution. The framework supports **automated commissioning** and **runtime configuration management** to adapt control logic dynamically."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, ensuring continuous synchronization between the physical building and its DT. The framework supports **low-latency data exchange** through Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling immediate updates to the DT based on physical asset states. This real-time capability is critical for operational monitoring, control adjustments, and decision-making processes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)** with the following components:
  - **BIM Core**: Semantic backbone for asset representation.
  - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange.
  - **Control Layer**: Building Control Systems (BCS) and adaptive algorithms (e.g., reinforcement learning).
  - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring.
  - **Extension Layer**: Custom services and plugins integrated via standardized APIs.
  The constellation supports **modular scalability**, allowing individual components (e.g., lighting sub-systems) to be deployed independently or as part of a larger DT ecosystem."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life cycle stages** of the building, including:
  - **Design phase**: Leverages BIM models for initial DT setup.
  - **Construction phase**: Supports clash detection and progress tracking.
  - **Operation phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control.
  - **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: Facilitates data-driven decision-making for upgrades.
  The DT’s representation evolves from **as-designed (ideal)** to **as-operated**, with continuous synchronization ensuring alignment with the physical asset’s current state."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-time synchronization** (via Eclipse Hono/Ditto),
  - **Model validation** (semantic consistency checks),
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** (quantifying alignment with the physical asset).
  The framework minimizes semantic drift by embedding runtime semantics directly into BIM models, ensuring the DT remains a faithful representation of the physical building."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and the DT is established through **Eclipse Hono and Ditto**, which provide real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication. The middleware supports **standardized protocols** for seamless integration with building control systems and operational data sources, ensuring low-latency synchronization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, particularly **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, which serves as the semantic backbone for integrating static and runtime data. The approach ensures compatibility with existing AECO systems and workflows, facilitating interoperability and scalability."
]
